top_signals.title: US allows more than dozen ships through to Iranian ports, lifting blockade under deal, Vance says
top_signals.summary: Vice President JD Vance said Thursday that the U.S. Navy has allowed more than a dozen ships through to Iranian ports, lifting a blockade as part of an agreement to end the war. Vance made the announcement at a White House press briefing, where he said more oil is now flowing through the Strait of ...

alerts.title: CFTC, SEC request public comment to clarify definition of ‘swaps’ amid CME lawsuit
